_comment: Zoho Catalyst AppSail configuration for Ibha KSP backend (Flask).
build_command: pip install flask flask-cors psycopg2-binary pydantic requests llama-index-core sentence-transformers chromadb
notes: The Flask app object is named 'app' in local_server.py.
gunicorn must be added to requirements if not already installed.
For AppSail, set all env vars in the Catalyst Console under AppSail > Environment Variables.
The database must be a reachable PostgreSQL instance (Catalyst DataStore does not support direct psycopg2 connections; use Neon, Supabase, or Elephant SQL as the hosted Postgres).
Run scripts/ingest_rag.py once after deployment to populate the ChromaDB vector store.
ChromaDB persists to ./chroma_db/; on AppSail this is ephemeral — consider using ChromaDB cloud or pgvector instead for production.
